mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reminders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY remind_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reminders (user_id, message, remind_type, remind_time, remind_date, day_of_week, cron_expression, target_id, target_type, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{message}, #{remindType}, #{remindTime}, #{remindDate}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{cronExpression}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE reminders SET message = #{message}, remind_type = #{remindType}, remind_time = #{remindTime}, remind_date = #{remindDate}, day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression}, target_id = #{targetId}, target_type = #{targetType}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
